home.intro: PDF, DOCX, Markdown, HTML, images, and spreadsheets. Drop a file and pick the exact output SuperDoc can create today.
home.emptyCatalogTitle: Actions are temporarily unavailable for .{{type}} files.
home.emptyCatalogBody: This file type is supported, but the operation catalog returned no actions.
home.catalogEmpty: Catalog returned no actions. Retry before starting.
home.pickTarget: Pick an enabled target to start a real conversion job.
home.formatsBody: Everyday office docs, developer formats, and images use the same direct conversion surface.

errors.multipleFiles: Multiple-file workflows are not available yet. Upload one file at a time.

pdfWord.label: PDF to Word
pdfWord.desc: Editable Word document from a PDF.

wordPdf.label: Word to PDF
wordPdf.desc: A clean, shareable PDF from Word files.

drop.title: Drop your file
drop.body: Drag a file onto the converter or browse from your device.

choose.title: Choose format
choose.body: SuperDoc detects the input and enables the formats the backend supports.

download.title: Download result
download.body: Processing runs as a real job, then unlocks your download when it is ready.

private.title: Private by default
private.body: Anonymous files are short-lived. Saved files require your account.

fast.title: Fast jobs
fast.body: Upload, processing, and download progress stay visible.

browser.title: Browser based
browser.body: Use it on desktop or mobile without installing an app.

honest.title: Honest targets
honest.body: Unsupported formats stay visible but disabled until the backend supports them.

free.a: Yes. Core conversion works without an account. Accounts are only needed for saved files.

unsupported.a: Unavailable targets remain visible but disabled for the selected file. Enabled actions come from the deployed operation catalog.

edit.a: Yes. When the catalog exposes a browser editor for the selected file, the Edit action appears next to the converter.

routes.q: Do routes and saved files still work?
routes.a: Yes. Uploads, job polling, editor routing, authentication, and dashboard files use the existing backend flow.

settings.title: Settings
settings.dangerBody: Once deleted, your account cannot be recovered.

dashboard.authUnavailable: Saved files are unavailable while registration is closed.
dashboard.retention: Up to 10 documents · stored for 7 days
dashboard.noFiles: No files yet. Upload something from
dashboard.confirmDelete: Delete this file? This cannot be undone.

processing.unlock: The download button will unlock when processing finishes.

editor.savedFilesNote: Saved files count toward the 10-document limit and expire after 7 days.
